title: miliusa amplexicaulis
intro: Miliusa amplexicaulis, also known as the Himalayan milu or Miliusa amplexicaulis, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Miliusa amplexicaulis include its ability to reduce fever, treat digestive issues, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Miliusa amplexicaulis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is also used in traditional medicine as a paste or powder.
